data: {"generalSituation":"Winds will be weak and the weather will be humid over Guangdong today and tomorrow. There will be coastal fog in the morning on Thursday, and it will be rather warm during the day. An easterly airstream will affect the coast of southern China on Friday to early next week. A band of clouds will also cover the region. With the easterly airstream moderating, the weather will improve gradually over the coast of Guangdong midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260318","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"East force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy.
